recommendations.title: The Last Man on Earth
recommendations.overview: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

recommendations.title: Campfire Tales
recommendations.overview: Anthology of famous, scary urban legends done with a modern twist.
recommendations.director: Martin Kunert, David Semel, Matt Cooper

recommendations.title: Infestation
recommendations.overview: After being stung by a giant insect, Cooper learns that these bugs are attacking the whole city. He joins forces with the survivors, in order to find a way to counter-attack.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: Escape from Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Comedy, Drama, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: In a world of fake castles and anthropomorphic rodents, an epic battle begins when an unemployed father's sanity is challenged by a chance encounter with two underage girls on holiday.

recommendations.title: Gorgo
recommendations.overview: Greedy sailors capture a giant lizard off the coast of Ireland and sell it to a London circus. Then its mother shows up.

recommendations.title: Dante's Inferno
recommendations.overview: The classic tale of Dante's journey through hell, loosely adapted from the Divine Comedy and inspired by the illustrations of Gustav Doré.  This historically important film stands as the first feature from Italy and the oldest fully-surviving feature
recommendations.director: Giuseppe de Liguoro, Francesco Bertolini, Adolfo Padovan

recommendations.title: Trilogy of Terror
recommendations.overview: A horror anthology containing three stories: a female college professor is aggressively pursued by one of her students; a prudish brunette determines that her free-spirited blonde sister is evil; and a woman's night turns upside down after she purcha

recommendations.title: Night of the Comet
recommendations.overview: After a comet wipes out most of life on Earth, two Valley Girls find themselves fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists.

recommendations.title: Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon Eternal the Movie Part 2
recommendations.overview: While under the care of the Outer Sailor Guardians, Hotaru begins to age rapidly. Then, the time comes for all the Sailor Guardians to reunite!
